title: Bill Hewlett
body: William Redington Hewlett ( HEW-lit; May 20, 1913 – January 12, 2001) was an American engineer and the co-founder, with David Packard, of the Hewlett-Packard Company (HP).
categories: All Wikipedia articles written in American English
